hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.js) node --check "$filepath" 2>&1 || echo 'HOOK_FAILED: JavaScript syntax error detected' ;; esac

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: .env files are protected' >&2; exit 1 ;; */package-lock.json) echo 'BLOCKED: package-lock.json should only be modified by npm install' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" in *'git commit'*) staged=$(cd "C:/Users/thoma/OneDrive/Dokumente/GitHub/orbital-clash" && git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); has_src=false; has_test=false; has_e2e=false; has_md=false; for f in $staged; do case "$f" in src/client/*|src/server/*|src/shared/[!.]*.ts) has_src=true ;; src/shared/*.test.ts) has_test=true ;; e2e/*) has_e2e=true ;; *.md) has_md=true ;; esac; done; warnings=''; if [ "$has_src" = true ] && [ "$has_test" = false ]; then warnings="${warnings}WARNING: src/ files staged but no test files. Add tests for logic changes.
"; fi; if [ "$has_src" = true ] && [ "$has_e2e" = false ]; then warnings="${warnings}REMINDER: Source files changed. Did you run npm run test:e2e? Consider if new E2E tests are needed.
"; fi; if [ "$has_md" = false ]; then warnings="${warnings}WARNING: No .md files staged. Check if CLAUDE.md or README.md need updating.
"; fi; warnings="${warnings}CHECKLIST: Ensure npx tsc --noEmit + npm test + npm run test:e2e all passed before this commit.
"; if [ -n "$warnings" ]; then printf "$warnings"; fi ;; esac
